requirements.task_name: Book the cheapest sunset river cruise for 2 adults on a Friday in June under $80 total
requirements.task_description: Find sunset or evening river cruises on Fridays in June, filter by price under $40 per person, prioritize options with drinks included, and book the cheapest suitable cruise for 2 adults until the booking summary page.

requirements.task_name: Book two daytime sightseeing tours on the same day for 1 adult under $120 total with at least a 2-hour gap
requirements.task_description: Find daytime sightseeing boat tours on the same date, choose two different tours for 1 adult with start times at least 2 hours apart and a combined total under $120, and add both to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Reserve the longest private evening charter for 10 people on a September weekend under $900
requirements.task_description: Search for private boat charters in September on a Saturday or Sunday evening, filter for group size 10, duration at least 3 hours, price under $900 total, and book the longest available option for 10 guests up to the details page.

requirements.task_name: Purchase a $150 gift card usable for any cruise with a personalized message
requirements.task_description: Navigate to the gift card section, create a gift card for exactly $150 that can be used for any cruise, enter recipient and sender information plus a custom message, and add it to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Book a family-friendly lunch cruise for 2 adults and 1 child before 2 PM under $200 total
requirements.task_description: Find a family-friendly river cruise that includes lunch, departs before 2:00 PM, and costs under $200 total for 2 adults and 1 child, then book it up to the booking summary page.

requirements.task_name: Book the highest-rated dinner cruise with live music of at least 2.5 hours for 2 adults under $120 per adult and apply a promo code
requirements.task_description: Search for dinner cruises with live music lasting at least 2.5 hours, sort by rating, choose the best-rated option with an adult price under $120, book for 2 adults on the next Saturday, and apply the promo code 'SUMMER10' at checkout.

requirements.task_name: Find the earliest boat tour from Old Town Pier within 7 days for 3 adults priced between $30 and $60 per adult
requirements.task_description: Use search or location filters to find tours departing from 'Old Town Pier' within the next 7 days, with 60–90 minute duration and an adult ticket price between $30 and $60, then select the earliest available departure and add 3 adult tickets to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Compare sightseeing cruises and book one that includes both audio guide and free 24-hour cancellation for 1 adult under $75
requirements.task_description: Browse sightseeing cruises, filter by price under $75, compare at least two options to find one that includes both an audio guide and free cancellation up to 24 hours before departure, and book it for 1 adult.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getCruiseTourDetails(cruiseTourId) is called, read the existing 'task8_viewedCruiseIds' array from localStorage (or initialize to an empty array if missing); if cruiseTourId is not already present in the array, append it and save the updated array back to localStorage.
required_variables.value_to_set: A JSON-encoded array of unique cruise_tour_id strings representing all tours whose details have been viewed so far (e.g., previousIds.concat([cruiseTourId]) when not already included).
required_variables.reason: Tracks which cruise detail pages were actually opened so the evaluator can verify that at least two different under-$75 sightseeing cruises were compared before the final booking.
